topic_integrations.title: B1. Structured Cabling System

sections.section_title: ما هي شبكة الــــ DATA NETWORK؟
sections.design_ar: صمم الشبكة كمنظومة قابلة للتوسع: عدد outlets، حجم patch panels، rack space، switch ports، PoE/UPS، ومسار copper/fiber.
sections.design_en: Design the network as an expandable system: outlets, patch panels, rack space, switch ports, PoE/UPS, and copper/fiber pathways.
sections.site_ar: تحقق من labels، مسار الكابل، bend radius، طول copper channel، ترتيب patch cords، وتهوية الراك قبل الاختبار.
sections.site_en: Check labels, cable route, bend radius, copper channel length, patch-cord dressing, and rack ventilation before testing.
sections.test_ar: اختبر wiremap/length/loss للنحاس وOTDR أو loss budget للفايبر، ثم اربط النتيجة برقم outlet أو fiber core.
sections.test_en: Test copper wiremap/length/loss and fiber OTDR or loss budget, then tie each result to outlet or fiber-core ID.
mistakes: Sizing switches and patch panels for the current outlet count only, with no spare capacity.
Treating fire alarm as a normal data-network subsystem instead of life-safety infrastructure.
visual_ideas: rack elevation with patch panel, switch, PDU, and cable organizers

sections.design_ar: صمم المسار حسب level budget: مصدر الإشارة، headend، amplifier gain، splitter/tap loss، cable loss، ومستوى الإشارة عند outlet.
sections.design_en: Design the path around the level budget: source, headend, amplifier gain, splitter/tap loss, cable loss, and outlet signal level.
sections.site_ar: افحص connector quality، اتجاه tap/splitter، power للـ active devices، grounding، وترتيب coax داخل الراك.
sections.site_en: Inspect connector quality, tap/splitter direction, power for active devices, grounding, and coax dressing inside the rack.
sections.test_ar: سجل RF/IF level، quality، channel scan، picture/audio result، أو multicast stability في IPTV.
sections.test_en: Record RF/IF level, quality, channel scan, picture/audio result, or IPTV multicast stability.
mistakes: Adding splitters without recalculating downstream loss.

sections.section_title: الأجزاء الرئيسية لنظام IP -NURSE CALL SYSTEM CONFIGURATION)
sections.design_ar: اربط كل room وbed بمحطة المريض، corridor indication، nurse station، escalation rules، integration، والـ power/network backup.
sections.design_en: Map each room and bed to patient station, corridor indication, nurse station, escalation rules, integration, and backed-up power/network.
sections.site_ar: تأكد من location عند السرير والحمام، visibility للمبة الممر، labels، cable/network، ومطابقة room numbers.
sections.site_en: Verify bed and bathroom station locations, corridor-lamp visibility, labels, cable/network, and room-number mapping.
sections.test_ar: اختبر call، cancel، assistance، emergency، escalation، display، reports، وفشل الشبكة أو التغذية.
sections.test_en: Test call, cancel, assistance, emergency, escalation, display, reports, and network or power failure.
mistakes: Mapping room numbers late, causing nurse-station displays to disagree with architecture.

topic_integrations.title: Design coordination

sections.design_ar: ابدأ المشروع بتحديد scope لكل نظام، غرفه، متطلبات التغذية والـ UPS، ومسؤوليات التنسيق مع المعماري والميكانيكا والكهرباء.
sections.design_en: Start by defining each system scope, rooms, power and UPS needs, and coordination responsibilities with architecture, mechanical, and electrical teams.
sections.site_ar: في الموقع، اربط كل ملاحظة بمكان واضح: room، rack، riser، drawing revision، وسبب التأثير على نظام آخر.
sections.site_en: On site, tie each note to a clear room, rack, riser, drawing revision, and the affected adjacent system.
sections.test_ar: التسليم الجيد يجمع expected result، actual evidence، reference drawing، واسم المسؤول عن المراجعة.
sections.test_en: Good handover records expected result, actual evidence, reference drawing, and responsible reviewer.
mistakes: Using early estimates as final load values without checking selected equipment datasheets.
Coordinating rooms late after architecture and MEP layouts are frozen.

sections.section_title: Cross-system codes, standards, specifications, and acceptance criteria
sections.group: Codes, standards, testing, commissioning, and handover
sections.design_ar: كل standard أو specification يجب أن يتحول إلى acceptance criteria قابلة للاختبار وليست مجرد اسم في المستند.
sections.design_en: Every standard or specification must become testable acceptance criteria, not just a named reference.
sections.site_ar: التنفيذ المقبول يعتمد على approved revision، material submittal، site condition، ومسار واضح للـ NCR أو punch item.
sections.site_en: Accepted work depends on approved revision, material submittal, site condition, and a clear NCR or punch-item path.
sections.test_ar: اجعل كل test sheet يربط النظام، المكان، الجهاز، النتيجة، الصورة أو القراءة، والتوقيع.
sections.test_en: Each test sheet should connect system, location, asset, result, photo or reading, and signature.
mistakes: Writing generic pass/fail without evidence.
Using specifications without mapping clauses to drawings, BOQ, and test records.

topic_integrations.title: Patch panel

sections.design_ar: صمم المسار حسب level budget: مصدر الإشارة، headend، amplifier gain، splitter/tap loss، cable loss، ومستوى الإشارة عند outlet.
sections.design_en: Design the path around the level budget: source, headend, amplifier gain, splitter/tap loss, cable loss, and outlet signal level.
sections.site_ar: افحص connector quality، اتجاه tap/splitter، power للـ active devices، grounding، وترتيب coax داخل الراك.
sections.site_en: Inspect connector quality, tap/splitter direction, power for active devices, grounding, and coax dressing inside the rack.
sections.test_ar: سجل RF/IF level، quality، channel scan، picture/audio result، أو multicast stability في IPTV.
sections.test_en: Record RF/IF level, quality, channel scan, picture/audio result, or IPTV multicast stability.
mistakes: Adding splitters without recalculating downstream loss.

topic_integrations.source_reference: Low Current Systems for Electrical Power Engineers, Prof. Mahmoud Gilany, 2020
